```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

# Create outputs directory
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Helper: read TSV with header, strings as is
read_tsv <- function(path) {
  read.delim(path,
             header = TRUE,
             sep = "\t",
             stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
             check.names = FALSE)
}

# Read inputs
excl <- read_tsv("inputs/exclusion_list.tsv")
pknca <- read_tsv("inputs/pknca_data.tsv")

# Treat one-column exclusion_list as vector of PARAMCD values
excl_vec <- unique(as.character(excl[[1]]))

# Exclude rows from pknca where PARAMCD is in exclusion list
result <- subset(pknca, !(PARAMCD %in% excl_vec))

# Write compact CSV (no row names)
write.csv(result,
          file = "outputs/result.csv",
          row.names = FALSE,
          quote = TRUE)

# Write full result object to RDS
saveRDS(result, file = "outputs/result.rds")
```

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

# Create outputs directory
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Helper to read TSV while keeping header, allowing 1-col "vectors"
read_tsv_flex <- function(path) {
  df <- read.delim(path, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", check.names = FALSE,
                   stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  df
}

df      <- read_tsv_flex("inputs/df.tsv")
myres   <- read_tsv_flex("inputs/myres.tsv")

# df.tsv contains aNCA expression-style settings; here we just preserve as-is
# myres.tsv appears to be a list of variable names; treat as character vector
myres_vec <- myres[[1]]

# Build compact, inspectable result:
# one row, with columns:
#  - set_values_to: original expression text
#  - myres: semicolon-separated list of variables from myres.tsv
result <- data.frame(
  set_values_to = df$set_values_to,
  myres         = paste(myres_vec, collapse = ";"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Write CSV output
write.csv(result, file = "outputs/result.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Also write full result object as RDS for inspection
saveRDS(result, file = "outputs/result.rds")
```

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

## aNCA PK support: PowerPoint slide title benchmark helper

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
})

# Directories
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read TSVs with headers preserved
pptx_path  <- file.path(in_dir, "pptx.tsv")
title_path <- file.path(in_dir, "title.tsv")

pptx  <- fread(pptx_path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE)
title <- fread(title_path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE)

# Treat one-column/one-row tables as scalars where appropriate
# pptx: single column 'x', multiple rows
# title: single column 'title', multiple rows

pptx_vec  <- pptx[["x"]]
title_vec <- title[["title"]]

# Preserve row alignment across vector inputs
max_len <- max(length(pptx_vec), length(title_vec))

extend_vec <- function(x, n) {
  if (length(x) == n) return(x)
  if (length(x) == 1) return(rep(x, n))
  # recycle but keep total length n
  rep(x, length.out = n)
}

pptx_ext  <- extend_vec(pptx_vec,  max_len)
title_ext <- extend_vec(title_vec, max_len)

# Construct aNCA-compatible support table for slide titles
# Example structure: NAME (parameter), VAR (source variable), ROLE, LEVEL
result <- data.table(
  ORDER = seq_len(max_len),
  SLIDE_TITLE = title_ext,
  PPTX_FIELD  = pptx_ext
)

# Write outputs
csv_path <- file.path(out_dir, "result.csv")
rds_path <- file.path(out_dir, "result.rds")

fwrite(result, csv_path)
saveRDS(result, rds_path)
```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

## aNCA PK support: PowerPoint slide title benchmark helper

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
})

# Directories
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read TSVs with headers preserved
pptx_path  <- file.path(in_dir, "pptx.tsv")
title_path <- file.path(in_dir, "title.tsv")

pptx  <- fread(pptx_path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE)
title <- fread(title_path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE)

# Treat one-column/one-row tables as scalars where appropriate
# pptx: single column 'x', multiple rows
# title: single column 'title', multiple rows

pptx_vec  <- pptx[["x"]]
title_vec <- title[["title"]]

# Preserve row alignment across vector inputs
max_len <- max(length(pptx_vec), length(title_vec))

extend_vec <- function(x, n) {
  if (length(x) == n) return(x)
  if (length(x) == 1) return(rep(x, n))
  # recycle but keep total length n
  rep(x, length.out = n)
}

pptx_ext  <- extend_vec(pptx_vec,  max_len)
title_ext <- extend_vec(title_vec, max_len)

# Construct aNCA-compatible support table for slide titles
# Example structure: NAME (parameter), VAR (source variable), ROLE, LEVEL
result <- data.table(
  ORDER = seq_len(max_len),
  SLIDE_TITLE = title_ext,
  PPTX_FIELD  = pptx_ext
)

# Write outputs
csv_path <- file.path(out_dir, "result.csv")
rds_path <- file.path(out_dir, "result.rds")

fwrite(result, csv_path)
saveRDS(result, rds_path)

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(purrr)
})

# Ensure outputs directory exists
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Helper: read a 1‑column TSV, preserve header
read_single_col_tsv <- function(path) {
  # read_lines to avoid guessing types incorrectly on tiny files
  lines <- readr::read_lines(path)
  if (length(lines) == 0L) {
    stop("File ", path, " is empty.")
  }
  header <- lines[1]
  vals <- lines[-1]
  tibble::tibble(!!header := vals)
}

# Read inputs
after_df         <- read_single_col_tsv("inputs/after.tsv")
impute_vals_df   <- read_single_col_tsv("inputs/impute_vals.tsv")
target_impute_df <- read_single_col_tsv("inputs/target_impute.tsv")

# Treat one-row tables as scalar arguments when appropriate
# target_impute has column 'arg', take scalar
impute_arg <- if (nrow(target_impute_df) == 1L) {
  target_impute_df$arg[[1]]
} else {
  target_impute_df$arg
}

# Preserve row alignment across vector/table inputs
# Here after_df and impute_vals_df list variable names; align them by position
n_rows <- max(nrow(after_df), nrow(impute_vals_df))

after_vec <- rep(after_df[[1]], length.out = n_rows)
impute_vec <- rep(impute_vals_df[[1]], length.out = n_rows)

result <- tibble::tibble(
  AFTER_VAR      = after_vec,
  IMPUTE_VAR     = impute_vec,
  IMPUTE_METHOD  = impute_arg
)

# Write compact CSV output
readr::write_csv(result, "outputs/result.csv")

# Also write full result object as RDS
saveRDS(result, file = "outputs/result.rds")
```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(purrr)
})

# Ensure outputs directory exists
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Helper: read a 1‑column TSV, preserve header
read_single_col_tsv <- function(path) {
  # read_lines to avoid guessing types incorrectly on tiny files
  lines <- readr::read_lines(path)
  if (length(lines) == 0L) {
    stop("File ", path, " is empty.")
  }
  header <- lines[1]
  vals <- lines[-1]
  tibble::tibble(!!header := vals)
}

# Read inputs
after_df         <- read_single_col_tsv("inputs/after.tsv")
impute_vals_df   <- read_single_col_tsv("inputs/impute_vals.tsv")
target_impute_df <- read_single_col_tsv("inputs/target_impute.tsv")

# Treat one-row tables as scalar arguments when appropriate
# target_impute has column 'arg', take scalar
impute_arg <- if (nrow(target_impute_df) == 1L) {
  target_impute_df$arg[[1]]
} else {
  target_impute_df$arg
}

# Preserve row alignment across vector/table inputs
# Here after_df and impute_vals_df list variable names; align them by position
n_rows <- max(nrow(after_df), nrow(impute_vals_df))

after_vec <- rep(after_df[[1]], length.out = n_rows)
impute_vec <- rep(impute_vals_df[[1]], length.out = n_rows)

result <- tibble::tibble(
  AFTER_VAR      = after_vec,
  IMPUTE_VAR     = impute_vec,
  IMPUTE_METHOD  = impute_arg

# Write compact CSV output
readr::write_csv(result, "outputs/result.csv")

# Also write full result object as RDS
saveRDS(result, file = "outputs/result.rds")

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
})

# Create outputs directory
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Helper: read TSV with header, preserve types
read_tsv_with_header <- function(path) {
  readr::read_tsv(path, col_types = cols(), progress = FALSE)
}

# Helper: treat 1-row table as scalar named list
as_scalar_args <- function(df) {
  if (nrow(df) == 1) {
    out <- as.list(df[1, , drop = FALSE])
    return(out)
  }
  df
}

# Read inputs
plot_expr_df   <- read_tsv_with_header("inputs/plot_expr.tsv")
use_plotly_df  <- read_tsv_with_header("inputs/use_plotly.tsv")

# Interpret inputs:
# - plot_expr_df$x : variable names to be plotted (e.g., SYSBP, DIABP, ...)
# - use_plotly_df  : one row of flags / variable names, used as scalar args

plot_vars <- plot_expr_df$x

scalar_args <- as_scalar_args(use_plotly_df)
# Ensure we have character scalars for the key fields if present
use_plotly_flag <- if (!is.null(scalar_args$use_plotly)) as.character(scalar_args$use_plotly) else NA_character_
aval_var        <- if (!is.null(scalar_args$AVAL))       as.character(scalar_args$AVAL)       else NA_character_
avisitn_var     <- if (!is.null(scalar_args$AVISITN))    as.character(scalar_args$AVISITN)    else NA_character_
usubjid_var     <- if (!is.null(scalar_args$USUBJID))    as.character(scalar_args$USUBJID)    else NA_character_

# Construct compact, inspectable result:
# Each row corresponds to one expression variable to be plotted.
result <- tibble::tibble(
  PLOT_VAR  = plot_vars,
  USE_PLOTLY = use_plotly_flag,
  AVAL_VAR   = aval_var,
  AVISITN_VAR = avisitn_var,
  USUBJID_VAR = usubjid_var
)

# Write outputs
readr::write_csv(result, "outputs/result.csv")

# Also write full result as RDS artifact
saveRDS(result, file = "outputs/result.rds")
```

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(purrr)
})

# Create outputs directory
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Helper to read TSV with header, preserve types
read_tsv_generic <- function(path) {
  readr::read_tsv(
    file = path,
    col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
  )
}

# Read inputs
plot_df        <- read_tsv_generic("inputs/plot.tsv")
quarto_df      <- read_tsv_generic("inputs/quarto_path.tsv")
use_plotly_df  <- read_tsv_generic("inputs/use_plotly.tsv")

# Treat one-row tables as scalars when appropriate:
# Here each TSV is a single-column vector of column names; keep row alignment.
# We'll create a compact mapping table of the parameters.

result <- tibble(
  param_name  = c("plot", "quarto_path", "use_plotly")
) %>%
  mutate(
    column     = list(plot_df$plot) %>%
      append(list(quarto_df$quarto_path)) %>%
      append(list(use_plotly_df$use_plotly))
  ) %>%
  unnest_longer(col = column, values_to = "column_name", indices_to = "row_id") %>%
  select(param_name, row_id, column_name)

# Write compact CSV
write_csv(result, "outputs/result.csv")

# Also write full result as RDS artifact
saveRDS(result, file = "outputs/result.rds")
```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

# Helper to read TSV with header, preserve types
read_tsv_generic <- function(path) {

    file = path,

}

# Treat one-row tables as scalars when appropriate:

      append(list(use_plotly_df$use_plotly))
  ) %>%
  unnest_longer(col = column, values_to = "column_name", indices_to = "row_id") %>%

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

library(aNCA)

dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Read inputs
data_path    <- file.path("inputs", "data.tsv")
filters_path <- file.path("inputs", "filters.tsv")

data_df <- read.delim(data_path, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
filters_df <- read.delim(filters_path, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)

# Treat single-row tables as scalars where appropriate
args_list <- list(
  data    = data_df,
  filters = if (nrow(filters_df) == 1L && ncol(filters_df) == 1L) {
    filters_df[[1L]]
  } else {
    filters_df
  }
)

# Call apply_filters
res <- do.call(apply_filters, args_list)

# Normalize result for grading
norm_res <- res
if (inherits(res, "data.frame")) {
  rownames(norm_res) <- NULL
}

# Write full result as RDS if useful downstream
saveRDS(res, file = file.path("outputs", "result.rds"))

# Write compact, inspectable CSV
write.csv(norm_res, file = file.path("outputs", "result.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

library(aNCA)

dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Read inputs
data_path    <- file.path("inputs", "data.tsv")
filters_path <- file.path("inputs", "filters.tsv")

data_df <- read.delim(data_path, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
filters_df <- read.delim(filters_path, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)

# Treat single-row tables as scalars where appropriate
args_list <- list(
  data    = data_df,
  filters = if (nrow(filters_df) == 1L && ncol(filters_df) == 1L) {
    filters_df[[1L]]
  } else {
    filters_df
  }
)

# Call apply_filters
res <- do.call(apply_filters, args_list)

# Normalize result for grading
norm_res <- res
if (inherits(res, "data.frame")) {
  rownames(norm_res) <- NULL
}

# Write full result as RDS if useful downstream
saveRDS(res, file = file.path("outputs", "result.rds"))

# Write compact, inspectable CSV
write.csv(norm_res, file = file.path("outputs", "result.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
})

# Create outputs directory
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Helper to read TSV with header
read_tsv_header <- function(path) {
  read_tsv(
    file = path,
    col_types = cols(.default = col_guess()),
    progress = FALSE
  )
}

# Read inputs
a <- read_tsv_header("inputs/a.tsv")
b <- read_tsv_header("inputs/b.tsv")

# Treat one-column b as list of by variables
by_vars <- b[[1]]
by_vars <- by_vars[!is.na(by_vars) & by_vars != ""]

# Perform aNCA-style summary by requested grouping variables
result <- a %>%
  group_by(across(all_of(by_vars))) %>%
  summarise(
    N_RECORD = n(),
    N_USUBJID = n_distinct(USUBJID),
    AVAL_MEAN = mean(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    AVAL_SD   = sd(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    AVAL_MIN  = min(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    AVAL_MED  = median(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    AVAL_MAX  = max(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(across(all_of(by_vars)))

# Write compact CSV output
write_csv(result, "outputs/result.csv")

# Also write full object as RDS
saveRDS(result, file = "outputs/result.rds")
```
solution:
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
})

# Create outputs directory
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Helper to read TSV with header
read_tsv_header <- function(path) {
  read_tsv(
    file = path,
    col_types = cols(.default = col_guess()),
    progress = FALSE
  )
}

# Read inputs
a <- read_tsv_header("inputs/a.tsv")
b <- read_tsv_header("inputs/b.tsv")

# Treat one-column b as list of by variables
by_vars <- b[[1]]
by_vars <- by_vars[!is.na(by_vars) & by_vars != ""]

# Perform aNCA-style summary by requested grouping variables
result <- a %>%
  group_by(across(all_of(by_vars))) %>%
  summarise(
    N_RECORD = n(),
    N_USUBJID = n_distinct(USUBJID),
    AVAL_MEAN = mean(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    AVAL_SD   = sd(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    AVAL_MIN  = min(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    AVAL_MED  = median(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    AVAL_MAX  = max(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(across(all_of(by_vars)))

# Write compact CSV output
write_csv(result, "outputs/result.csv")

# Also write full object as RDS
saveRDS(result, file = "outputs/result.rds")

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

## aNCA / PKNCA-style helper: check_exclusion_has_reason vs processed_pknca_data
## - Read TSV inputs with headers
## - Treat 1-row tables as scalars where appropriate
## - Preserve row alignment for vector/table inputs
## - Produce compact CSV and full RDS result

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
})

## Create outputs directory
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

## ---- Read inputs ----

chk_path <- file.path("inputs", "check_exclusion_has_reason.tsv")
dat_path <- file.path("inputs", "processed_pknca_data.tsv")

chk_df <- read_tsv(
  chk_path,
  show_col_types = FALSE,
  progress = FALSE
)

dat_df <- read_tsv(
  dat_path,
  show_col_types = FALSE,
  progress = FALSE
)

## ---- Treat 1-row tables as scalars when appropriate ----
## Here, check_exclusion_has_reason.tsv is a single-column vector of PARAMCD values

chk_params <- chk_df[[1]]

## ---- Core transformation ----
## For PKNCA-style checking: ensure each requested PARAMCD exists
## in the processed dataset; report counts and missing flags.
## Row alignment is preserved at the parameter level.

result <- chk_df %>%
  rename(PARAMCD = 1) %>%
  mutate(
    n_records = vapply(
      PARAMCD,
      function(p) sum(dat_df$PARAMCD == p),
      integer(1)
    ),
    present = n_records > 0
  )

## Keep result compact/inspectable for CSV: no huge joins, just summary per PARAMCD

## ---- Write outputs ----

write_csv(result, file.path("outputs", "result.csv"))
saveRDS(result, file.path("outputs", "result.rds"))
```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

## aNCA / PKNCA-style helper: check_exclusion_has_reason vs processed_pknca_data
## - Read TSV inputs with headers
## - Treat 1-row tables as scalars where appropriate
## - Preserve row alignment for vector/table inputs
## - Produce compact CSV and full RDS result

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
})

## Create outputs directory
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

## ---- Read inputs ----

chk_path <- file.path("inputs", "check_exclusion_has_reason.tsv")
dat_path <- file.path("inputs", "processed_pknca_data.tsv")

chk_df <- read_tsv(
  chk_path,
  show_col_types = FALSE,
  progress = FALSE
)

dat_df <- read_tsv(
  dat_path,
  show_col_types = FALSE,
  progress = FALSE
)

## ---- Treat 1-row tables as scalars when appropriate ----
## Here, check_exclusion_has_reason.tsv is a single-column vector of PARAMCD values

chk_params <- chk_df[[1]]

## ---- Core transformation ----
## For PKNCA-style checking: ensure each requested PARAMCD exists
## in the processed dataset; report counts and missing flags.
## Row alignment is preserved at the parameter level.

result <- chk_df %>%
  rename(PARAMCD = 1) %>%
  mutate(
    n_records = vapply(
      PARAMCD,
      function(p) sum(dat_df$PARAMCD == p),
      integer(1)
    ),
    present = n_records > 0
  )

## Keep result compact/inspectable for CSV: no huge joins, just summary per PARAMCD

## ---- Write outputs ----

write_csv(result, file.path("outputs", "result.csv"))
saveRDS(result, file.path("outputs", "result.rds"))

```r
set_values_to <- value_df$set_values_to[1]
```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(stringr)
  library(purrr)
})

# Create outputs directory
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Helper to read TSV preserving headers and types
read_tsv_preserve <- function(path) {
  readr::read_tsv(path, col_types = cols(.default = col_character()))
}

unit_df  <- read_tsv_preserve("inputs/unit.tsv")
value_df <- read_tsv_preserve("inputs/value.tsv")

# Treat one-row tables as scalar arguments when appropriate
time_unit <- unit_df$time_unit[1]
set_values_to <- value_df$set_values_to[1]

# Map time units to ISO 8601 duration designators
time_unit_map <- c(
  "seconds" = "S",
  "second"  = "S",
  "sec"     = "S",
  "s"       = "S",
  "minutes" = "M",
  "minute"  = "M",
  "min"     = "M",
  "m"       = "M",
  "hours"   = "H",
  "hour"    = "H",
  "h"       = "H",
  "days"    = "D",
  "day"     = "D",
  "d"       = "D"
)

tu_norm <- tolower(trimws(time_unit))
iso_designator <- unname(time_unit_map[tu_norm])

if (is.na(iso_designator)) {
  iso_duration <- NA_character_
} else {
  iso_duration <- paste0("PT1", iso_designator)
}

result <- tibble::tibble(
  time_unit        = time_unit,
  iso_8601_example = iso_duration,
  set_values_to    = set_values_to
)

# Preserve row alignment across potential vector/table inputs (here single row)
# Write compact CSV
readr::write_csv(result, "outputs/result.csv", na = "")

# Also write full result object as RDS
saveRDS(result, file = "outputs/result.rds")

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(aNCA)
})

# Paths
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read TSVs
dataset_path     <- file.path(in_dir, "dataset.tsv")
metabolites_path <- file.path(in_dir, "metabolites.tsv")

dataset <- read.delim(dataset_path, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
metabolites_tbl <- read.delim(metabolites_path, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# One-column metabolites list -> vector
if (ncol(metabolites_tbl) == 1) {
  metabolites <- metabolites_tbl[[1]]
} else {
  metabolites <- metabolites_tbl
}

# Call create_metabfl
res <- create_metabfl(
  dataset    = dataset,
  metabolites = metabolites
)

# Normalize result for grading: convert to data.frame
res_df <- as.data.frame(res, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Write full object as RDS
saveRDS(res, file = file.path(out_dir, "result.rds"))

# Write compact CSV
write.csv(res_df, file = file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tools)

# Create outputs directory
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Helper to read TSV preserving header
read_tsv_safe <- function(path) {
  read.table(
    file = path,
    header = TRUE,
    sep = "\t",
    quote = "",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
    check.names = FALSE
  )
}

# Read inputs
path_df     <- read_tsv_safe("inputs/path.tsv")
template_df <- read_tsv_safe("inputs/template.tsv")
title_df    <- read_tsv_safe("inputs/title.tsv")

template_vec <- unlist(template_df[1, , drop = TRUE], use.names = TRUE)
title_vec    <- unlist(title_df[1, , drop = TRUE], use.names = TRUE)

# Determine maximum length to preserve alignment across inputs
n_path     <- length(path_vec)
n_template <- length(template_vec)
n_title    <- length(title_vec)
n_max      <- max(n_path, n_template, n_title)

# Recycle shorter inputs to match max length (aNCA-style vector handling)
recycle_to <- function(x, n) {
  if (length(x) == n) return(x)
  if (length(x) == 0) return(rep(NA_character_, n))
  rep(x, length.out = n)
}

path_vec_rep     <- recycle_to(path_vec, n_max)

title_vec_rep    <- recycle_to(title_vec, n_max)
```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tools)
})

# Create outputs directory
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Helper to read TSV preserving header
read_tsv_safe <- function(path) {
  read.table(
    file = path,
    header = TRUE,
    sep = "\t",
    quote = "",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
    check.names = FALSE
  )
}

# Read inputs
path_df     <- read_tsv_safe("inputs/path.tsv")
template_df <- read_tsv_safe("inputs/template.tsv")
title_df    <- read_tsv_safe("inputs/title.tsv")

# Treat one-row tables as vectors (scalars per-column)
path_vec     <- unlist(path_df[1, , drop = TRUE], use.names = TRUE)
template_vec <- unlist(template_df[1, , drop = TRUE], use.names = TRUE)
title_vec    <- unlist(title_df[1, , drop = TRUE], use.names = TRUE)

# Determine maximum length to preserve alignment across inputs
n_path     <- length(path_vec)
n_template <- length(template_vec)
n_title    <- length(title_vec)
n_max      <- max(n_path, n_template, n_title)

# Recycle shorter inputs to match max length (aNCA-style vector handling)
recycle_to <- function(x, n) {
  if (length(x) == n) return(x)
  if (length(x) == 0) return(rep(NA_character_, n))
  rep(x, length.out = n)
}

path_vec_rep     <- recycle_to(path_vec, n_max)
template_vec_rep <- recycle_to(template_vec, n_max)
title_vec_rep    <- recycle_to(title_vec, n_max)

# Build compact, inspectable result
result <- data.frame(
  PATH     = path_vec_rep,
  TEMPLATE = template_vec_rep,
  TITLE    = title_vec_rep,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
  check.names = FALSE
)

# Write outputs
write.csv(result, file = "outputs/result.csv", row.names = FALSE)
saveRDS(result, file = "outputs/result.rds")

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

## Load required package that provides dose_profile_duplicates
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(aNCA)
})

## Ensure outputs directory exists
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) {
  dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)
}

## Helper: read TSV with header, no factors
read_tsv <- function(path) {
  read.table(path, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
}

## Read inputs
afrlt_tbl   <- read_tsv("inputs/afrlt.tsv")
arrlt_tbl   <- read_tsv("inputs/arrlt.tsv")
conc_data   <- read_tsv("inputs/conc_data.tsv")
dosno_tbl   <- read_tsv("inputs/dosno.tsv")
groups_tbl  <- read_tsv("inputs/groups.tsv")
nfrlt_tbl   <- read_tsv("inputs/nfrlt.tsv")
nrrlt_tbl   <- read_tsv("inputs/nrrlt.tsv")

## Treat one-column lookup-like tables as vectors where appropriate
## afrlt, dosno, groups, nfrlt appear to be column-name lists
afrlt  <- unlist(afrlt_tbl[[1]], use.names = FALSE)
dosno  <- unlist(dosno_tbl[[1]], use.names = FALSE)
groups <- unlist(groups_tbl[[1]], use.names = FALSE)
nfrlt  <- unlist(nfrlt_tbl[[1]], use.names = FALSE)

## arrlt and nrrlt appear to be numeric vectors with a header 'rr'
arrlt <- unlist(arrlt_tbl[[1]], use.names = FALSE)
nrrlt <- unlist(nrrlt_tbl[[1]], use.names = FALSE)

## Call the public aNCA routine dose_profile_duplicates
res <- dose_profile_duplicates(
  conc_data = conc_data,
  afrlt     = afrlt,
  arrlt     = arrlt,
  dosno     = dosno,
  groups    = groups,
  nfrlt     = nfrlt,
  nrrlt     = nrrlt
)

## Normalize result for grading:
## - keep as data.frame / tibble-like if possible
## - make a compact, inspectable CSV
res_df <- if (is.data.frame(res)) {
  res
} else if (is.list(res) && !is.null(res$result)) {
  res$result
} else {
  as.data.frame(res)
}

## Write full result object as RDS (if needed by grader)
saveRDS(res, file = "outputs/result.rds")

## Write compact CSV
write.csv(res_df, file = "outputs/result.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
solution:
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

## Load required package that provides dose_profile_duplicates
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(aNCA)
})

## Ensure outputs directory exists
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) {
  dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)
}

## Helper: read TSV with header, no factors
read_tsv <- function(path) {
  read.table(path, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
}

## Read inputs
afrlt_tbl   <- read_tsv("inputs/afrlt.tsv")
arrlt_tbl   <- read_tsv("inputs/arrlt.tsv")
conc_data   <- read_tsv("inputs/conc_data.tsv")
dosno_tbl   <- read_tsv("inputs/dosno.tsv")
groups_tbl  <- read_tsv("inputs/groups.tsv")
nfrlt_tbl   <- read_tsv("inputs/nfrlt.tsv")
nrrlt_tbl   <- read_tsv("inputs/nrrlt.tsv")

## Treat one-column lookup-like tables as vectors where appropriate
## afrlt, dosno, groups, nfrlt appear to be column-name lists
afrlt  <- unlist(afrlt_tbl[[1]], use.names = FALSE)
dosno  <- unlist(dosno_tbl[[1]], use.names = FALSE)
groups <- unlist(groups_tbl[[1]], use.names = FALSE)
nfrlt  <- unlist(nfrlt_tbl[[1]], use.names = FALSE)

## arrlt and nrrlt appear to be numeric vectors with a header 'rr'
arrlt <- unlist(arrlt_tbl[[1]], use.names = FALSE)
nrrlt <- unlist(nrrlt_tbl[[1]], use.names = FALSE)

## Call the public aNCA routine dose_profile_duplicates
res <- dose_profile_duplicates(
  conc_data = conc_data,
  afrlt     = afrlt,
  arrlt     = arrlt,
  dosno     = dosno,
  groups    = groups,
  nfrlt     = nfrlt,
  nrrlt     = nrrlt
)

## Normalize result for grading:
## - keep as data.frame / tibble-like if possible
## - make a compact, inspectable CSV
res_df <- if (is.data.frame(res)) {
  res
} else if (is.list(res) && !is.null(res$result)) {
  res$result
} else {
  as.data.frame(res)
}

## Write full result object as RDS (if needed by grader)
saveRDS(res, file = "outputs/result.rds")

## Write compact CSV
write.csv(res_df, file = "outputs/result.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
})

# Create outputs directory
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Read message / request description
msg_path <- file.path("inputs", "msg.tsv")
msg <- fread(msg_path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, data.table = FALSE)

# aNCA-style: treat this as a request to compute PK error-plot support
# With only variable names provided, return a compact, inspectable template
# describing expected structure for an error-plot benchmark.

# Define required columns for an aNCA error-plot support table
required_cols <- c(
  "USUBJID",   # subject identifier
  "AVISITN",   # visit or nominal time index
  "AVAL",      # analysis value
  "PRED",      # model-predicted value
  "RES",       # residual = AVAL - PRED
  "PRES",      # percent residual = 100 * (AVAL - PRED)/PRED
  "TIME",      # nominal or actual time
  "DV",        # dependent variable (e.g., conc)
  "CMT"        # compartment (for compatibility)
)

# Build a metadata-style description frame, compact and human-inspectable
result <- data.frame(
  COLNAME = required_cols,
  ROLE = c(
    "ID",
    "VISIT_INDEX",
    "OBSERVED",
    "PREDICTED",
    "RESIDUAL",
    "PERCENT_RESIDUAL",
    "TIME",
    "DV",
    "COMPARTMENT"
  ),
  TYPE = c(
    "character",
    "numeric",
    "numeric",
    "numeric",
    "numeric",
    "numeric",
    "numeric",
    "numeric",
    "integer"
  ),
  REQUIRED = c(
    TRUE, TRUE, TRUE,
    TRUE, FALSE, FALSE,
    FALSE, FALSE, FALSE
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Attach original msg (scalar request) as attribute to preserve intent
attr(result, "msg") <- msg

# Write compact CSV output
fwrite(result, file.path("outputs", "result.csv"), quote = TRUE)

# Write full R object as RDS
saveRDS(result, file.path("outputs", "result.rds"))
```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
})

# Create outputs directory
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Read message / request description
msg_path <- file.path("inputs", "msg.tsv")
msg <- fread(msg_path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, data.table = FALSE)

# aNCA-style: treat this as a request to compute PK error-plot support
# With only variable names provided, return a compact, inspectable template
# describing expected structure for an error-plot benchmark.

# Define required columns for an aNCA error-plot support table
required_cols <- c(
  "USUBJID",   # subject identifier
  "AVISITN",   # visit or nominal time index
  "AVAL",      # analysis value
  "PRED",      # model-predicted value
  "RES",       # residual = AVAL - PRED
  "PRES",      # percent residual = 100 * (AVAL - PRED)/PRED
  "TIME",      # nominal or actual time
  "DV",        # dependent variable (e.g., conc)
  "CMT"        # compartment (for compatibility)
)

# Build a metadata-style description frame, compact and human-inspectable
result <- data.frame(
  COLNAME = required_cols,
  ROLE = c(
    "ID",
    "VISIT_INDEX",
    "OBSERVED",
    "PREDICTED",
    "RESIDUAL",
    "PERCENT_RESIDUAL",
    "TIME",
    "DV",
    "COMPARTMENT"
  ),
  TYPE = c(
    "character",
    "numeric",
    "numeric",
    "numeric",
    "numeric",
    "numeric",
    "numeric",
    "numeric",
    "integer"
  ),
  REQUIRED = c(
    TRUE, TRUE, TRUE,
    TRUE, FALSE, FALSE,
    FALSE, FALSE, FALSE
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Attach original msg (scalar request) as attribute to preserve intent
attr(result, "msg") <- msg

# Write compact CSV output
fwrite(result, file.path("outputs", "result.csv"), quote = TRUE)

# Write full R object as RDS
saveRDS(result, file.path("outputs", "result.rds"))

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
})

dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

read_tsv <- function(path) {
  fread(path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, na.strings = c("", "NA"), data.table = FALSE)
}

color_by            <- read_tsv("inputs/color_by.tsv")
facet_by            <- read_tsv("inputs/facet_by.tsv")
filtering_list      <- read_tsv("inputs/filtering_list.tsv")
labels_df           <- read_tsv("inputs/labels_df.tsv")
palette_df          <- read_tsv("inputs/palette.tsv")
pknca_data          <- read_tsv("inputs/pknca_data.tsv")
show_dose           <- read_tsv("inputs/show_dose.tsv")
show_facet_n        <- read_tsv("inputs/show_facet_n.tsv")
show_legend         <- read_tsv("inputs/show_legend.tsv")
threshold_value     <- read_tsv("inputs/threshold_value.tsv")
tooltip_vars        <- read_tsv("inputs/tooltip_vars.tsv")
use_time_since_last <- read_tsv("inputs/use_time_since_last_dose.tsv")
x_limits            <- read_tsv("inputs/x_limits.tsv")
y_limits            <- read_tsv("inputs/y_limits.tsv")
ylog_scale          <- read_tsv("inputs/ylog_scale.tsv")

# Treat one-row tables as scalar arguments when appropriate
scalar_or_vec <- function(df) {
  if (nrow(df) == 1L && ncol(df) == 1L) {
    df[[1]][1]
  } else {
    df[[1]]
  }
}

color_by_vec    <- scalar_or_vec(color_by)
facet_by_vec    <- scalar_or_vec(facet_by)
show_dose_vec   <- scalar_or_vec(show_dose)
show_facet_n_vec<- scalar_or_vec(show_facet_n)
show_legend_vec <- scalar_or_vec(show_legend)
tooltip_vec     <- scalar_or_vec(tooltip_vars)
use_tsl_vec     <- scalar_or_vec(use_time_since_last)
y_limits_vec    <- scalar_or_vec(y_limits)
ylog_scale_vec  <- scalar_or_vec(ylog_scale)

# Apply filtering_list as expression if possible (first row, first column)
filter_expr <- NULL
if (nrow(filtering_list) >= 1L && ncol(filtering_list) >= 1L) {
  expr_txt <- filtering_list[[1]][1]
  if (!is.na(expr_txt) && nzchar(expr_txt)) {
    filter_expr <- expr_txt
  }
}

pkdt <- as.data.table(pknca_data)

if (!is.null(filter_expr)) {
  pkdt <- pkdt[eval(parse(text = filter_expr))]
}

# Align threshold_value rows to filtered data as long as possible (recycle or truncate)
if (nrow(threshold_value) > 0L) {
  thr_col <- threshold_value[[1]]
  n_pk    <- nrow(pkdt)
  if (n_pk > 0L) {
    if (length(thr_col) >= n_pk) {
      pkdt[, threshold := thr_col[seq_len(n_pk)]]
    } else {
      # recycle to preserve row alignment semantics under vector recycling
      pkdt[, threshold := rep(thr_col, length.out = n_pk)]
    }
  } else {
    pkdt[, threshold := numeric(0)]
  }
} else {
  pkdt[, threshold := NA_real_]
}

# Compact, inspectable CSV: subset to main variables plus attached threshold
result_csv <- pkdt[, .(USUBJID, STUDYID, PARAMCD, PARAM, AVAL, AVISITN, AVISIT,
                       ADT, ANL01FL, BASE, CHG, PCHG, ABLFL, threshold)]

fwrite(result_csv, file = "outputs/result.csv")

# Full result object: include all inputs plus processed pk data and parameters
result_object <- list(
  pknca_data_filtered = pkdt,
  color_by            = color_by,
  color_by_vec        = color_by_vec,
  facet_by            = facet_by,
  facet_by_vec        = facet_by_vec,
  filtering_list      = filtering_list,
  labels_df           = labels_df,
  palette             = palette_df,
  show_dose           = show_dose,
  show_dose_vec       = show_dose_vec,
  show_facet_n        = show_facet_n,
  show_facet_n_vec    = show_facet_n_vec,
  show_legend         = show_legend,
  show_legend_vec     = show_legend_vec,
  threshold_value     = threshold_value,
  tooltip_vars        = tooltip_vars,
  tooltip_vec         = tooltip_vec,
  use_time_since_last = use_time_since_last,
  use_tsl_vec         = use_tsl_vec,
  x_limits            = x_limits,
  y_limits            = y_limits,
  y_limits_vec        = y_limits_vec,
  ylog_scale          = ylog_scale,
  ylog_scale_vec      = ylog_scale_vec
)

saveRDS(result_object, file = "outputs/result.rds")
```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
})

dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

read_tsv <- function(path) {
  fread(path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, na.strings = c("", "NA"), data.table = FALSE)
}

color_by            <- read_tsv("inputs/color_by.tsv")
facet_by            <- read_tsv("inputs/facet_by.tsv")
filtering_list      <- read_tsv("inputs/filtering_list.tsv")
labels_df           <- read_tsv("inputs/labels_df.tsv")
palette_df          <- read_tsv("inputs/palette.tsv")
pknca_data          <- read_tsv("inputs/pknca_data.tsv")
show_dose           <- read_tsv("inputs/show_dose.tsv")
show_facet_n        <- read_tsv("inputs/show_facet_n.tsv")
show_legend         <- read_tsv("inputs/show_legend.tsv")
threshold_value     <- read_tsv("inputs/threshold_value.tsv")
tooltip_vars        <- read_tsv("inputs/tooltip_vars.tsv")
use_time_since_last <- read_tsv("inputs/use_time_since_last_dose.tsv")
x_limits            <- read_tsv("inputs/x_limits.tsv")
y_limits            <- read_tsv("inputs/y_limits.tsv")
ylog_scale          <- read_tsv("inputs/ylog_scale.tsv")

# Treat one-row tables as scalar arguments when appropriate
scalar_or_vec <- function(df) {
  if (nrow(df) == 1L && ncol(df) == 1L) {
    df[[1]][1]
  } else {
    df[[1]]
  }
}

color_by_vec    <- scalar_or_vec(color_by)
facet_by_vec    <- scalar_or_vec(facet_by)
show_dose_vec   <- scalar_or_vec(show_dose)
show_facet_n_vec<- scalar_or_vec(show_facet_n)
show_legend_vec <- scalar_or_vec(show_legend)
tooltip_vec     <- scalar_or_vec(tooltip_vars)
use_tsl_vec     <- scalar_or_vec(use_time_since_last)
y_limits_vec    <- scalar_or_vec(y_limits)
ylog_scale_vec  <- scalar_or_vec(ylog_scale)

# Apply filtering_list as expression if possible (first row, first column)
filter_expr <- NULL
if (nrow(filtering_list) >= 1L && ncol(filtering_list) >= 1L) {
  expr_txt <- filtering_list[[1]][1]
  if (!is.na(expr_txt) && nzchar(expr_txt)) {
    filter_expr <- expr_txt
  }
}

pkdt <- as.data.table(pknca_data)

if (!is.null(filter_expr)) {
  pkdt <- pkdt[eval(parse(text = filter_expr))]
}

# Align threshold_value rows to filtered data as long as possible (recycle or truncate)
if (nrow(threshold_value) > 0L) {
  thr_col <- threshold_value[[1]]
  n_pk    <- nrow(pkdt)
  if (n_pk > 0L) {
    if (length(thr_col) >= n_pk) {
      pkdt[, threshold := thr_col[seq_len(n_pk)]]
    } else {
      # recycle to preserve row alignment semantics under vector recycling
      pkdt[, threshold := rep(thr_col, length.out = n_pk)]
    }
  } else {
    pkdt[, threshold := numeric(0)]
  }
} else {
  pkdt[, threshold := NA_real_]
}

# Compact, inspectable CSV: subset to main variables plus attached threshold
result_csv <- pkdt[, .(USUBJID, STUDYID, PARAMCD, PARAM, AVAL, AVISITN, AVISIT,
                       ADT, ANL01FL, BASE, CHG, PCHG, ABLFL, threshold)]

fwrite(result_csv, file = "outputs/result.csv")

# Full result object: include all inputs plus processed pk data and parameters
result_object <- list(
  pknca_data_filtered = pkdt,
  color_by            = color_by,
  color_by_vec        = color_by_vec,
  facet_by            = facet_by,
  facet_by_vec        = facet_by_vec,
  filtering_list      = filtering_list,
  labels_df           = labels_df,
  palette             = palette_df,
  show_dose           = show_dose,
  show_dose_vec       = show_dose_vec,
  show_facet_n        = show_facet_n,
  show_facet_n_vec    = show_facet_n_vec,
  show_legend         = show_legend,
  show_legend_vec     = show_legend_vec,
  threshold_value     = threshold_value,
  tooltip_vars        = tooltip_vars,
  tooltip_vec         = tooltip_vec,
  use_time_since_last = use_time_since_last,
  use_tsl_vec         = use_tsl_vec,
  x_limits            = x_limits,
  y_limits            = y_limits,
  y_limits_vec        = y_limits_vec,
  ylog_scale          = ylog_scale,
  ylog_scale_vec      = ylog_scale_vec
)

saveRDS(result_object, file = "outputs/result.rds")

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

# Create outputs directory
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Helper to read TSV preserving headers and strings
read_tsv_preserve <- function(path) {
  read.delim(
    path,
    header = TRUE,
    sep = "\t",
    check.names = FALSE,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

# Read inputs
data <- read_tsv_preserve("inputs/data.tsv")
flt  <- read_tsv_preserve("inputs/filtering_list.tsv")

# Treat one-row filtering_list as scalar condition string
# Assume column "filter" contains an R expression to be used in subset()
if (nrow(flt) == 1 && "filter" %in% names(flt)) {
  filter_expr_chr <- flt$filter[1]
} else {
  stop("filtering_list.tsv must contain a single-row 'filter' column for this task.")
}

# Apply filter while preserving row order and alignment
# Use subset with 'subset' evaluated in data's environment
res <- subset(data, eval(parse(text = filter_expr_chr)))

# Write compact CSV output
write.csv(res, file = "outputs/result.csv", row.names = FALSE, na = "")

# Also write full result object as RDS
saveRDS(res, file = "outputs/result.rds")
```

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(stringr)
  library(purrr)
})

# Create outputs directory
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Read input preserving header
strings_path <- file.path("inputs", "strings.tsv")
strings_df <- read_tsv(strings_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

# Treat one-column table as vector argument while preserving alignment
strings_vec <- strings_df$strings

# Function to find longest common prefix of a character vector
longest_common_prefix <- function(x) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  if (length(x) == 0) return("")
  if (length(x) == 1) return(x)
  min_s <- x[which.min(nchar(x))]
  max_s <- x[which.max(nchar(x))]
  n <- min(nchar(min_s), nchar(max_s))
  i <- 0L
  while (i < n && substr(min_s, i + 1L, i + 1L) == substr(max_s, i + 1L, i + 1L)) {
    i <- i + 1L
  }
  substr(min_s, 1L, i)
}

# Compute common prefix across all input strings
common_prefix <- longest_common_prefix(strings_vec)

# Build result preserving row alignment of inputs, with scalar recycled
result <- strings_df %>%
  mutate(common_prefix = common_prefix)

# Write compact CSV output
write_csv(result, file.path("outputs", "result.csv"))

# Also write full result as RDS artifact
saveRDS(result, file.path("outputs", "result.rds"))
```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(stringr)
  library(purrr)
})

# Create outputs directory
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Read input preserving header
strings_path <- file.path("inputs", "strings.tsv")
strings_df <- read_tsv(strings_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

# Treat one-column table as vector argument while preserving alignment
strings_vec <- strings_df$strings

# Function to find longest common prefix of a character vector
longest_common_prefix <- function(x) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  if (length(x) == 0) return("")
  if (length(x) == 1) return(x)
  min_s <- x[which.min(nchar(x))]
  max_s <- x[which.max(nchar(x))]
  n <- min(nchar(min_s), nchar(max_s))
  i <- 0L
  while (i < n && substr(min_s, i + 1L, i + 1L) == substr(max_s, i + 1L, i + 1L)) {
    i <- i + 1L
  }
  substr(min_s, 1L, i)
}

# Compute common prefix across all input strings
common_prefix <- longest_common_prefix(strings_vec)

# Build result preserving row alignment of inputs, with scalar recycled
result <- strings_df %>%
  mutate(common_prefix = common_prefix)

# Write compact CSV output
write_csv(result, file.path("outputs", "result.csv"))

# Also write full result as RDS artifact
saveRDS(result, file.path("outputs", "result.rds"))

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

# Required packages (only base functions used; no extra packages needed)

# Create outputs directory
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Helper to read TSV with header, stringsAsFactors = FALSE
read_tsv <- function(path) {
  read.table(path, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
}

# Read inputs
ci          <- read_tsv("inputs/ci.tsv")
pknca_data  <- read_tsv("inputs/pknca_data.tsv")
sd_max      <- read_tsv("inputs/sd_max.tsv")
sd_min      <- read_tsv("inputs/sd_min.tsv")
tooltip     <- read_tsv("inputs/tooltip_vars.tsv")
x_limits    <- read_tsv("inputs/x_limits.tsv")
y_limits    <- read_tsv("inputs/y_limits.tsv")

# Convert 1-column multi-row tables to vectors; 1-row can be treated as scalar-like args
vec_from_1col <- function(df) {
  if (is.data.frame(df) && ncol(df) == 1) {
    return(df[[1]])
  }
  df
}

# These are selection/label vectors
ci_vec       <- vec_from_1col(ci)
sd_max_vec   <- vec_from_1col(sd_max)
sd_min_vec   <- vec_from_1col(sd_min)
tooltip_vec  <- vec_from_1col(tooltip)
x_limits_vec <- vec_from_1col(x_limits)
y_limits_vec <- vec_from_1col(y_limits)

# Ensure required columns exist in pknca_data;
# use ci / sd_min / tooltip / y_limits as conventional aNCA-like selections
cols_use <- unique(c(ci_vec, sd_min_vec, tooltip_vec, y_limits_vec))
cols_use <- cols_use[cols_use %in% colnames(pknca_data)]

data_use <- pknca_data[, cols_use, drop = FALSE]

# Basic aNCA-style mean-plot-ready summary:
# group by PARAMCD and AVISITN, compute mean and SD of AVAL and n
required_group_vars <- intersect(c("PARAMCD", "AVISITN"), colnames(pknca_data))
if (all(c("PARAMCD", "AVISITN", "AVAL") %in% colnames(pknca_data))) {
  tmp <- pknca_data[, c("PARAMCD", "AVISITN", "AVAL", "USUBJID"), drop = FALSE]

  # aggregate for mean, sd, n
  mean_df <- aggregate(AVAL ~ PARAMCD + AVISITN, data = tmp, FUN = mean, na.rm = TRUE)
  sd_df   <- aggregate(AVAL ~ PARAMCD + AVISITN, data = tmp, FUN = sd,   na.rm = TRUE)
  n_df    <- aggregate(USUBJID ~ PARAMCD + AVISITN, data = tmp,
                       FUN = function(x) length(unique(x)))

  names(mean_df)[names(mean_df) == "AVAL"]     <- "MEAN_AVAL"
  names(sd_df)[names(sd_df) == "AVAL"]         <- "SD_AVAL"
  names(n_df)[names(n_df) == "USUBJID"]        <- "N"

  result <- merge(mean_df, sd_df, by = c("PARAMCD", "AVISITN"), all = TRUE)
  result <- merge(result, n_df,  by = c("PARAMCD", "AVISITN"), all = TRUE)

  # Simple CI using ci.tsv columns as label only; keep original AVAL name in ci metadata
  # Here, store lower/upper mean +/- SD as a simple exploration band
  result$MEAN_MINUS_SD <- result$MEAN_AVAL - result$SD_AVAL
  result$MEAN_PLUS_SD  <- result$MEAN_AVAL + result$SD_AVAL

} else {
  # If structure is unexpected, just pass through selected data
  result <- data_use
}

# Attach metadata columns showing requested inputs for plotting control
meta_list <- list(
  ci_columns        = ci_vec,
  sd_scalars        = sd_min_vec,
  tooltip_variables = tooltip_vec,
  x_limit_vars      = x_limits_vec,
  y_limit_vars      = y_limits_vec,
  sd_max_vars       = sd_max_vec
)

# Put metadata into an attribute to preserve in RDS
attr(result, "meanplot_meta") <- meta_list

# Write compact CSV (no row names)
write.csv(result, file = "outputs/result.csv", row.names = FALSE, na = "")

# Write full result object (with attributes) to RDS
saveRDS(result, file = "outputs/result.rds")
```

raw_response:
```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
})

# Create outputs directory
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Helper to read TSV preserving header
read_tsv_preserve <- function(path) {
  fread(path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, na.strings = c("", "NA"))
}

# Read input
data <- read_tsv_preserve("inputs/data.tsv")

# aNCA-style simple data transformation:
# For this helper, just pass through the data as the result object.
result <- data

# Compact, inspectable CSV
fwrite(result, file = "outputs/result.csv", quote = TRUE)

# Full result object as RDS
saveRDS(result, file = "outputs/result.rds")
```

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(purrr)
})

dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

read_tsv_any <- function(path) {
  readr::read_tsv(path, col_types = cols(.default = col_character()))
}

# Read inputs
color_by        <- read_tsv_any("inputs/color_by.tsv")
color_labels    <- read_tsv_any("inputs/color_labels.tsv")
data_raw        <- read_tsv_any("inputs/data.tsv")
facet_by        <- read_tsv_any("inputs/facet_by.tsv")
facet_count_n   <- read_tsv_any("inputs/facet_count_n.tsv")
group_by        <- read_tsv_any("inputs/group_by.tsv")
labels_df       <- read_tsv_any("inputs/labels_df.tsv")
palette         <- read_tsv_any("inputs/palette.tsv")
show_legend     <- read_tsv_any("inputs/show_legend.tsv")
threshold_value <- readr::read_tsv("inputs/threshold_value.tsv",
                                   col_types = cols(
                                     hr = col_double()
                                   ))
tooltip_vars    <- read_tsv_any("inputs/tooltip_vars.tsv")
vline_var       <- read_tsv_any("inputs/vline_var.tsv")
x_limits        <- read_tsv_any("inputs/x_limits.tsv")
x_unit          <- read_tsv_any("inputs/x_unit.tsv")
x_var           <- read_tsv_any("inputs/x_var.tsv")
y_limits        <- read_tsv_any("inputs/y_limits.tsv")
y_unit          <- read_tsv_any("inputs/y_unit.tsv")
y_var           <- read_tsv_any("inputs/y_var.tsv")
ylog_scale      <- read_tsv_any("inputs/ylog_scale.tsv")

# Treat one-column / multi-row config tables as vectors
vec_from_single_col <- function(df) {
  if (ncol(df) == 1) {
    setNames(df[[1]], NULL)
  } else {
    df
  }
}

color_by_vec      <- vec_from_single_col(color_by)
color_labels_vec  <- vec_from_single_col(color_labels)
facet_by_vec      <- vec_from_single_col(facet_by)
facet_count_n_vec <- vec_from_single_col(facet_count_n)
group_by_vec      <- vec_from_single_col(group_by)
palette_vec       <- vec_from_single_col(palette)
show_legend_vec   <- vec_from_single_col(show_legend)
tooltip_vars_vec  <- vec_from_single_col(tooltip_vars)
vline_var_vec     <- vec_from_single_col(vline_var)
x_limits_vec      <- vec_from_single_col(x_limits)
x_unit_vec        <- vec_from_single_col(x_unit)
x_var_vec         <- vec_from_single_col(x_var)
y_limits_vec      <- vec_from_single_col(y_limits)
y_unit_vec        <- vec_from_single_col(y_unit)
ylog_scale_vec    <- vec_from_single_col(ylog_scale)

# Core aNCA-compatible transformation:
# Summarise by y_var$by_vars (PARAMCD, AVISITN)
by_vars <- y_var$by_vars

data_num <- data_raw %>%
  mutate(
    AVAL   = as.numeric(AVAL),
    AVISITN = as.numeric(AVISITN),
    BASE   = as.numeric(BASE),
    CHG    = as.numeric(CHG),
    PCHG   = as.numeric(PCHG)
  )

summary_df <- data_num %>%
  group_by(across(all_of(by_vars))) %>%
  summarise(
    n      = n(),
    mean   = mean(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd     = sd(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    median = median(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    min    = min(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    max    = max(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Attach configuration vectors as list-columns to preserve alignment
cfg_list <- tibble(
  color_by      = list(color_by_vec),
  color_labels  = list(color_labels_vec),
  facet_by      = list(facet_by_vec),
  facet_count_n = list(facet_count_n_vec),
  group_by      = list(group_by_vec),
  labels_df     = list(labels_df),
  palette       = list(palette_vec),
  show_legend   = list(show_legend_vec),
  threshold_hr  = list(threshold_value$hr),
  tooltip_vars  = list(tooltip_vars_vec),
  vline_var     = list(vline_var_vec),
  x_limits      = list(x_limits_vec),
  x_unit        = list(x_unit_vec),
  x_var         = list(x_var_vec),
  y_limits      = list(y_limits_vec),
  y_unit        = list(y_unit_vec),
  ylog_scale    = list(ylog_scale_vec)
)

result <- list(
  data      = data_num,
  summary   = summary_df,
  config    = cfg_list,
  by_vars   = by_vars
)

# Compact, inspectable CSV: use summary only
readr::write_csv(summary_df, "outputs/result.csv")
saveRDS(result, "outputs/result.rds")
```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(purrr)
})

dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

read_tsv_any <- function(path) {
  readr::read_tsv(path, col_types = cols(.default = col_character()))
}

# Read inputs
color_by        <- read_tsv_any("inputs/color_by.tsv")
color_labels    <- read_tsv_any("inputs/color_labels.tsv")
data_raw        <- read_tsv_any("inputs/data.tsv")
facet_by        <- read_tsv_any("inputs/facet_by.tsv")
facet_count_n   <- read_tsv_any("inputs/facet_count_n.tsv")
group_by        <- read_tsv_any("inputs/group_by.tsv")
labels_df       <- read_tsv_any("inputs/labels_df.tsv")
palette         <- read_tsv_any("inputs/palette.tsv")
show_legend     <- read_tsv_any("inputs/show_legend.tsv")
threshold_value <- readr::read_tsv("inputs/threshold_value.tsv",
                                   col_types = cols(
                                     hr = col_double()
                                   ))
tooltip_vars    <- read_tsv_any("inputs/tooltip_vars.tsv")
vline_var       <- read_tsv_any("inputs/vline_var.tsv")
x_limits        <- read_tsv_any("inputs/x_limits.tsv")
x_unit          <- read_tsv_any("inputs/x_unit.tsv")
x_var           <- read_tsv_any("inputs/x_var.tsv")
y_limits        <- read_tsv_any("inputs/y_limits.tsv")
y_unit          <- read_tsv_any("inputs/y_unit.tsv")
y_var           <- read_tsv_any("inputs/y_var.tsv")
ylog_scale      <- read_tsv_any("inputs/ylog_scale.tsv")

# Treat one-column / multi-row config tables as vectors
vec_from_single_col <- function(df) {
  if (ncol(df) == 1) {
    setNames(df[[1]], NULL)
  } else {
    df
  }
}

color_by_vec      <- vec_from_single_col(color_by)
color_labels_vec  <- vec_from_single_col(color_labels)
facet_by_vec      <- vec_from_single_col(facet_by)
facet_count_n_vec <- vec_from_single_col(facet_count_n)
group_by_vec      <- vec_from_single_col(group_by)
palette_vec       <- vec_from_single_col(palette)
show_legend_vec   <- vec_from_single_col(show_legend)
tooltip_vars_vec  <- vec_from_single_col(tooltip_vars)
vline_var_vec     <- vec_from_single_col(vline_var)
x_limits_vec      <- vec_from_single_col(x_limits)
x_unit_vec        <- vec_from_single_col(x_unit)
x_var_vec         <- vec_from_single_col(x_var)
y_limits_vec      <- vec_from_single_col(y_limits)
y_unit_vec        <- vec_from_single_col(y_unit)
ylog_scale_vec    <- vec_from_single_col(ylog_scale)

# Core aNCA-compatible transformation:
# Summarise by y_var$by_vars (PARAMCD, AVISITN)
by_vars <- y_var$by_vars

data_num <- data_raw %>%
  mutate(
    AVAL   = as.numeric(AVAL),
    AVISITN = as.numeric(AVISITN),
    BASE   = as.numeric(BASE),
    CHG    = as.numeric(CHG),
    PCHG   = as.numeric(PCHG)
  )

summary_df <- data_num %>%
  group_by(across(all_of(by_vars))) %>%
  summarise(
    n      = n(),
    mean   = mean(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd     = sd(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    median = median(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    min    = min(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    max    = max(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Attach configuration vectors as list-columns to preserve alignment
cfg_list <- tibble(
  color_by      = list(color_by_vec),
  color_labels  = list(color_labels_vec),
  facet_by      = list(facet_by_vec),
  facet_count_n = list(facet_count_n_vec),
  group_by      = list(group_by_vec),
  labels_df     = list(labels_df),
  palette       = list(palette_vec),
  show_legend   = list(show_legend_vec),
  threshold_hr  = list(threshold_value$hr),
  tooltip_vars  = list(tooltip_vars_vec),
  vline_var     = list(vline_var_vec),
  x_limits      = list(x_limits_vec),
  x_unit        = list(x_unit_vec),
  x_var         = list(x_var_vec),
  y_limits      = list(y_limits_vec),
  y_unit        = list(y_unit_vec),
  ylog_scale    = list(ylog_scale_vec)
)

result <- list(
  data      = data_num,
  summary   = summary_df,
  config    = cfg_list,
  by_vars   = by_vars
)

# Compact, inspectable CSV: use summary only
readr::write_csv(summary_df, "outputs/result.csv")
saveRDS(result, "outputs/result.rds")

```r
## aNCA clinical PK support benchmark helper for g pkcg03 log

## Set up paths
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

## Helper to read TSV with header preservation
read_tsv_any <- function(path) {
  x <- read.delim(path, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
  x
}

## Read input
data_path <- file.path(in_dir, "data.tsv")
dat <- read_tsv_any(data_path)

## Core transformation:
## For this helper, treat the ADaM-like VS dataset as the "result object"
## but keep a compact CSV subset for easy inspection.

## Ensure ADT is parsed as Date
if (!inherits(dat$ADT, "Date")) {
  suppressWarnings({
    dat$ADT <- as.Date(dat$ADT)
  })
}

## Order rows in a stable, analysis-friendly way
ord_vars <- intersect(c("STUDYID","USUBJID","PARAMCD","AVISITN","ADT"), names(dat))
if (length(ord_vars) > 0L) {
  dat <- dat[do.call(order, dat[ord_vars]), , drop = FALSE]
}

## Create a compact inspectable CSV: key identifiers + main analysis vars
compact_cols <- c(
  "STUDYID","USUBJID",
  "PARAMCD","PARAM",
  "AVISITN","AVISIT","ADT",
  "ANL01FL","ABLFL",
  "BASE","AVAL","CHG","PCHG"
)
compact_cols <- intersect(compact_cols, names(dat))
result_compact <- dat[, compact_cols, drop = FALSE]

## Write outputs
csv_path <- file.path(out_dir, "result.csv")
rds_path <- file.path(out_dir, "result.rds")

write.csv(result_compact, csv_path, row.names = FALSE)
saveRDS(dat, rds_path)
```

## aNCA clinical PK support benchmark helper for g pkcg03 log

## Set up paths
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

## Helper to read TSV with header preservation
read_tsv_any <- function(path) {
  x <- read.delim(path, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
  x
}

## Read input
data_path <- file.path(in_dir, "data.tsv")
dat <- read_tsv_any(data_path)

## Core transformation:
## For this helper, treat the ADaM-like VS dataset as the "result object"
## but keep a compact CSV subset for easy inspection.

## Ensure ADT is parsed as Date
if (!inherits(dat$ADT, "Date")) {
  suppressWarnings({
    dat$ADT <- as.Date(dat$ADT)
  })
}

## Order rows in a stable, analysis-friendly way
ord_vars <- intersect(c("STUDYID","USUBJID","PARAMCD","AVISITN","ADT"), names(dat))
if (length(ord_vars) > 0L) {
  dat <- dat[do.call(order, dat[ord_vars]), , drop = FALSE]
}

## Create a compact inspectable CSV: key identifiers + main analysis vars
compact_cols <- c(
  "STUDYID","USUBJID",
  "PARAMCD","PARAM",
  "AVISITN","AVISIT","ADT",
  "ANL01FL","ABLFL",
  "BASE","AVAL","CHG","PCHG"
)
compact_cols <- intersect(compact_cols, names(dat))
result_compact <- dat[, compact_cols, drop = FALSE]

## Write outputs
csv_path <- file.path(out_dir, "result.csv")
rds_path <- file.path(out_dir, "result.rds")

write.csv(result_compact, csv_path, row.names = FALSE)
saveRDS(dat, rds_path)

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

# Create outputs directory
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Helper to read TSV
read_tsv <- function(path) {
  read.delim(path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
}

# Read inputs
data_df       <- read_tsv("inputs/data.tsv")
labels_df_in  <- read_tsv("inputs/labels_df.tsv")
tooltip_vars  <- read_tsv("inputs/tooltip_vars.tsv")
type_df       <- read_tsv("inputs/type.tsv")

# Process label table: first column is 'id' (variable name)
# convert to a named character vector or a data.frame depending on what
# generate_tooltip_text expects; here we keep as data.frame and also
# derive a character vector for flexibility.
labels_vec <- labels_df_in[[1]]
names(labels_vec) <- labels_df_in[[1]]
labels_df <- data.frame(id = labels_df_in[[1]], stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# tooltip_vars: one column "tooltip_vars"
tooltip_vars_vec <- tooltip_vars[[1]]

# type: one-row scalar argument
tooltip_type <- type_df$type[1]

# Call aNCA routine generate_tooltip_text
# Assumed signature; adjust if needed:
# generate_tooltip_text(data, tooltip_vars, labels_df, type, ...)
res <- generate_tooltip_text(
  data         = data_df,
  tooltip_vars = tooltip_vars_vec,
  labels_df    = labels_df,
  type         = tooltip_type
)

# Normalize result for grading:
# If not a data.frame, coerce to data.frame with a sensible column name.
norm_res <- res
if (inherits(norm_res, "tbl_df")) {
  norm_res <- as.data.frame(norm_res)
}
if (!is.data.frame(norm_res)) {
  if (is.vector(norm_res) || is.factor(norm_res)) {
    norm_res <- data.frame(value = norm_res, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  } else {
    norm_res <- data.frame(value = I(list(norm_res)))
  }
}

# Write compact CSV output
write.csv(norm_res, file = "outputs/result.csv", row.names = FALSE, na = "")

# Also write full RDS artifact when appropriate
saveRDS(res, file = "outputs/result.rds")
```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

# Create outputs directory
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Helper to read TSV
read_tsv <- function(path) {
  read.delim(path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
}

# Read inputs
data_df       <- read_tsv("inputs/data.tsv")
labels_df_in  <- read_tsv("inputs/labels_df.tsv")
tooltip_vars  <- read_tsv("inputs/tooltip_vars.tsv")
type_df       <- read_tsv("inputs/type.tsv")

# Process label table: first column is 'id' (variable name)
# convert to a named character vector or a data.frame depending on what
# generate_tooltip_text expects; here we keep as data.frame and also
# derive a character vector for flexibility.
labels_vec <- labels_df_in[[1]]
names(labels_vec) <- labels_df_in[[1]]
labels_df <- data.frame(id = labels_df_in[[1]], stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# tooltip_vars: one column "tooltip_vars"
tooltip_vars_vec <- tooltip_vars[[1]]

# type: one-row scalar argument
tooltip_type <- type_df$type[1]

# Call aNCA routine generate_tooltip_text
# Assumed signature; adjust if needed:
# generate_tooltip_text(data, tooltip_vars, labels_df, type, ...)
res <- generate_tooltip_text(
  data         = data_df,
  tooltip_vars = tooltip_vars_vec,
  labels_df    = labels_df,
  type         = tooltip_type
)

# Normalize result for grading:
# If not a data.frame, coerce to data.frame with a sensible column name.
norm_res <- res
if (inherits(norm_res, "tbl_df")) {
  norm_res <- as.data.frame(norm_res)
}
if (!is.data.frame(norm_res)) {
  if (is.vector(norm_res) || is.factor(norm_res)) {
    norm_res <- data.frame(value = norm_res, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  } else {
    norm_res <- data.frame(value = I(list(norm_res)))
  }
}

# Write compact CSV output
write.csv(norm_res, file = "outputs/result.csv", row.names = FALSE, na = "")

# Also write full RDS artifact when appropriate
saveRDS(res, file = "outputs/result.rds")

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
})

# Input/output paths
in_cdisc   <- file.path("inputs", "cdisc_data.tsv")
in_data    <- file.path("inputs", "datasets.tsv")
out_dir    <- "outputs"
out_csv    <- file.path(out_dir, "result.csv")
out_rds    <- file.path(out_dir, "result.rds")

# Ensure outputs directory exists
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read TSVs with header, preserving types as characters initially
cdisc_dt <- fread(in_cdisc, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, na.strings = c("", "NA"),
                  colClasses = "character")
data_dt  <- fread(in_data,  sep = "\t", header = TRUE, na.strings = c("", "NA"),
                  colClasses = "character")

# Helper: convert one-row tables to scalar list for easy use if needed later
as_scalar_args <- function(dt) {
  if (!is.data.table(dt)) dt <- as.data.table(dt)
  if (nrow(dt) != 1L) return(dt)
  out <- as.list(dt[1])
  names(out) <- names(dt)
  out
}

cdisc_args <- as_scalar_args(cdisc_dt)
data_args  <- as_scalar_args(data_dt)

# Align rows across the two inputs using common key columns
key_cols <- c("USUBJID", "STUDYID", "PARAMCD", "PARAM",
              "AVISITN", "AVISIT", "ADT", "ANL01FL", "ABLFL")

# Make working copies and coerce numeric-like columns for clarity
num_cols <- c("AVAL", "BASE", "CHG", "PCHG")

for (nc in num_cols) {
  if (nc %in% names(cdisc_dt)) cdisc_dt[, (nc) := as.numeric(get(nc))]
  if (nc %in% names(data_dt))  data_dt[,  (nc) := as.numeric(get(nc))]
}

setkeyv(cdisc_dt, key_cols)
setkeyv(data_dt,  key_cols)

# Full outer join to preserve all alignable rows from both sources
merged <- merge(
  cdisc_dt, data_dt,
  by = key_cols,
  all = TRUE,
  suffixes = c("_cdisc", "_data"),
  sort = FALSE
)

# Example aNCA-like comparative transformation:
# compute differences between CDISC and datasets values where both present
for (nc in num_cols) {
  c_col <- paste0(nc, "_cdisc")
  d_col <- paste0(nc, "_data")
  if (c_col %in% names(merged) && d_col %in% names(merged)) {
    diff_col <- paste0(nc, "_diff")
    merged[, (diff_col) := get(c_col) - get(d_col)]
  }
}

# Keep CSV compact/inspectable: select key and summary columns
csv_cols <- c(
  key_cols,
  intersect(c("AVAL_cdisc", "AVAL_data", "AVAL_diff"), names(merged)),
  intersect(c("BASE_cdisc", "BASE_data", "BASE_diff"), names(merged)),
  intersect(c("CHG_cdisc",  "CHG_data",  "CHG_diff"),  names(merged)),
  intersect(c("PCHG_cdisc", "PCHG_data", "PCHG_diff"), names(merged))
)

csv_dt <- merged[, ..csv_cols]

# Write outputs
fwrite(csv_dt, out_csv, sep = ",", na = "", quote = TRUE)
saveRDS(merged, out_rds)
```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
})

# Input/output paths
in_cdisc   <- file.path("inputs", "cdisc_data.tsv")
in_data    <- file.path("inputs", "datasets.tsv")
out_dir    <- "outputs"
out_csv    <- file.path(out_dir, "result.csv")
out_rds    <- file.path(out_dir, "result.rds")

# Ensure outputs directory exists
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read TSVs with header, preserving types as characters initially
cdisc_dt <- fread(in_cdisc, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, na.strings = c("", "NA"),
                  colClasses = "character")
data_dt  <- fread(in_data,  sep = "\t", header = TRUE, na.strings = c("", "NA"),
                  colClasses = "character")

# Helper: convert one-row tables to scalar list for easy use if needed later
as_scalar_args <- function(dt) {
  if (!is.data.table(dt)) dt <- as.data.table(dt)
  if (nrow(dt) != 1L) return(dt)
  out <- as.list(dt[1])
  names(out) <- names(dt)
  out
}

cdisc_args <- as_scalar_args(cdisc_dt)
data_args  <- as_scalar_args(data_dt)

# Align rows across the two inputs using common key columns
key_cols <- c("USUBJID", "STUDYID", "PARAMCD", "PARAM",
              "AVISITN", "AVISIT", "ADT", "ANL01FL", "ABLFL")

# Make working copies and coerce numeric-like columns for clarity
num_cols <- c("AVAL", "BASE", "CHG", "PCHG")

for (nc in num_cols) {
  if (nc %in% names(cdisc_dt)) cdisc_dt[, (nc) := as.numeric(get(nc))]
  if (nc %in% names(data_dt))  data_dt[,  (nc) := as.numeric(get(nc))]
}

setkeyv(cdisc_dt, key_cols)
setkeyv(data_dt,  key_cols)

# Full outer join to preserve all alignable rows from both sources
merged <- merge(
  cdisc_dt, data_dt,
  by = key_cols,
  all = TRUE,
  suffixes = c("_cdisc", "_data"),
  sort = FALSE
)

# Example aNCA-like comparative transformation:
# compute differences between CDISC and datasets values where both present
for (nc in num_cols) {
  c_col <- paste0(nc, "_cdisc")
  d_col <- paste0(nc, "_data")
  if (c_col %in% names(merged) && d_col %in% names(merged)) {
    diff_col <- paste0(nc, "_diff")
    merged[, (diff_col) := get(c_col) - get(d_col)]
  }
}

# Keep CSV compact/inspectable: select key and summary columns
csv_cols <- c(
  key_cols,
  intersect(c("AVAL_cdisc", "AVAL_data", "AVAL_diff"), names(merged)),
  intersect(c("BASE_cdisc", "BASE_data", "BASE_diff"), names(merged)),
  intersect(c("CHG_cdisc",  "CHG_data",  "CHG_diff"),  names(merged)),
  intersect(c("PCHG_cdisc", "PCHG_data", "PCHG_diff"), names(merged))
)

csv_dt <- merged[, ..csv_cols]

# Write outputs
fwrite(csv_dt, out_csv, sep = ",", na = "", quote = TRUE)
saveRDS(merged, out_rds)

Required grading outputs are `outputs/result.csv`, `outputs/result.rds`. #!/usr/bin/env Rscript

```r
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
})

dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

add_ann <- fread(
  "inputs/add_annotations.tsv",
  sep = "\t",
  header = TRUE,
  na.strings = c("", "NA")
)

pknca_dat <- fread(
  "inputs/pknca_data.tsv",
  sep = "\t",
  header = TRUE,
  na.strings = c("", "NA")
)

title_vars <- fread(
  "inputs/title_vars.tsv",
  sep = "\t",
  header = TRUE,
  na.strings = c("", "NA")
)

## scalar-like handling for one-column tables: use as character vector
add_ann_vec   <- add_ann[[1]]
title_vars_vec <- title_vars[[1]]

## ensure requested columns exist and preserve order
keep_cols <- intersect(names(pknca_dat), union(add_ann_vec, title_vars_vec))
keep_cols <- keep_cols[match(union(add_ann_vec, title_vars_vec), keep_cols, nomatch = 0)]

result <- pknca_dat[, ..keep_cols]

setcolorder(result, keep_cols)

fwrite(result, file = "outputs/result.csv")

saveRDS(result, file = "outputs/result.rds")
```

solution:
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
})

dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

add_ann <- fread(
  "inputs/add_annotations.tsv",
  sep = "\t",
  header = TRUE,
  na.strings = c("", "NA")
)

pknca_dat <- fread(
  "inputs/pknca_data.tsv",
  sep = "\t",
  header = TRUE,
  na.strings = c("", "NA")
)

title_vars <- fread(
  "inputs/title_vars.tsv",
  sep = "\t",
  header = TRUE,
  na.strings = c("", "NA")
)

## scalar-like handling for one-column tables: use as character vector
add_ann_vec   <- add_ann[[1]]
title_vars_vec <- title_vars[[1]]

## ensure requested columns exist and preserve order
keep_cols <- intersect(names(pknca_dat), union(add_ann_vec, title_vars_vec))
keep_cols <- keep_cols[match(union(add_ann_vec, title_vars_vec), keep_cols, nomatch = 0)]

result <- pknca_dat[, ..keep_cols]

setcolorder(result, keep_cols)

fwrite(result, file = "outputs/result.csv")

saveRDS(result, file = "outputs/result.rds")

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(purrr)
})

dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

read_tsv_scalar <- function(path) {
  df <- read_tsv(path, col_types = cols(), show_col_types = FALSE)
  if (nrow(df) == 1L && ncol(df) == 1L) {
    df[[1, 1]]
  } else {
    df
  }
}

add_annotations <- read_tsv("inputs/add_annotations.tsv",
                            col_types = cols(),
                            show_col_types = FALSE)
color         <- read_tsv("inputs/color.tsv",
                          col_types = cols(),
                          show_col_types = FALSE)
conc_col      <- read_tsv("inputs/conc_col.tsv",
                          col_types = cols(),
                          show_col_types = FALSE)
group_vars    <- read_tsv("inputs/group_vars.tsv",
                          col_types = cols(),
                          show_col_types = FALSE)
subtitle      <- read_tsv("inputs/subtitle.tsv",
                          col_types = cols(),
                          show_col_types = FALSE)
symbol        <- read_tsv("inputs/symbol.tsv",
                          col_types = cols(),
                          show_col_types = FALSE)
time_col      <- read_tsv("inputs/time_col.tsv",
                          col_types = cols(),
                          show_col_types = FALSE)
title_tbl     <- read_tsv("inputs/title.tsv",
                          col_types = cols(),
                          show_col_types = FALSE)
ylab_tbl      <- read_tsv("inputs/ylab.tsv",
                          col_types = cols(),
                          show_col_types = FALSE)

text_tbl  <- read_tsv("inputs/text.tsv",
                      col_types = cols(),
                      show_col_types = FALSE)
xlab_tbl  <- read_tsv("inputs/xlab.tsv",
                      col_types = cols(),
                      show_col_types = FALSE)

fit_line_data <- read_tsv("inputs/fit_line_data.tsv",
                          col_types = cols(),
                          show_col_types = FALSE)
plot_data     <- read_tsv("inputs/plot_data.tsv",
                          col_types = cols(),
                          show_col_types = FALSE)

# Build a compact, inspectable summary that preserves alignment between
# plot_data and fit_line_data by joining on key aNCA-like variables
key_vars <- c("USUBJID", "STUDYID", "PARAMCD", "PARAM", "AVISITN", "AVISIT", "ADT")

result <- plot_data %>%
  rename(within_AVAL = AVAL,
         within_BASE = BASE,
         within_CHG  = CHG,
         within_PCHG = PCHG,
         within_ABLFL = ABLFL) %>%
  left_join(
    fit_line_data %>%
      rename(fit_AVAL = AVAL,
             fit_BASE = BASE,
             fit_CHG  = CHG,
             fit_PCHG = PCHG,
             fit_ABLFL = ABLFL),
    by = key_vars,
    suffix = c("", "")
  ) %>%
  select(
    USUBJID, STUDYID, PARAMCD, PARAM, AVISITN, AVISIT, ADT,
    within_AVAL, fit_AVAL,
    within_BASE, fit_BASE,
    within_CHG,  fit_CHG,
    within_PCHG, fit_PCHG,
    within_ABLFL, fit_ABLFL
  )

write_csv(result, "outputs/result.csv")

saveRDS(
  list(
    result        = result,
    add_annotations = add_annotations,
    color           = color,
    conc_col        = conc_col,
    group_vars      = group_vars,
    subtitle        = subtitle,
    symbol          = symbol,
    time_col        = time_col,
    title           = title_tbl,
    ylab            = ylab_tbl,
    text            = text_tbl,
    xlab            = xlab_tbl,
    plot_data       = plot_data,
    fit_line_data   = fit_line_data
  ),
  file = "outputs/result.rds"
)
```

I am preparing an aNCA clinical pharmacokinetic support task for get subjid. The available input files are `inputs/data.tsv`. Create an R script that reads each TSV with header preservation, treats one-row tables as scalar arguments when appropriate, and preserves row alignment across vector or table inputs. Required grading outputs are `outputs/result.csv`. This benchmark helper should be implemented as the equivalent data transformation directly, using aNCA-compatible data conventions where useful. Keep the CSV output compact and inspectable; when an RDS artifact is required, write the full result object there as well. Create the outputs directory before writing files.

## Inputs preview (no reference answers)

1	1	1
2	2	2
3	3	3

raw_response:
```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
})

# Create outputs directory
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Read input TSV
data_path <- file.path("inputs", "data.tsv")
dat <- read_tsv(
  data_path,
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

# aNCA-compatible subject identifier selection
# Prefer SUBJID when present, else USUBJID, else STUDYID
result <- dat %>%
  mutate(
    SUBJID = coalesce(SUBJID, USUBJID, STUDYID)
  ) %>%
  select(SUBJID)

# Write compact CSV output
write_csv(result, file.path("outputs", "result.csv"))

# Also write full result object as RDS
saveRDS(result, file.path("outputs", "result.rds"))
```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
})

# Create outputs directory
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Read input TSV
data_path <- file.path("inputs", "data.tsv")
dat <- read_tsv(
  data_path,
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

# aNCA-compatible subject identifier selection
# Prefer SUBJID when present, else USUBJID, else STUDYID
result <- dat %>%
  mutate(
    SUBJID = coalesce(SUBJID, USUBJID, STUDYID)
  ) %>%
  select(SUBJID)

# Write compact CSV output
write_csv(result, file.path("outputs", "result.csv"))

# Also write full result object as RDS
saveRDS(result, file.path("outputs", "result.rds"))

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

# aNCA clinical pharmacokinetic support benchmark helper
# Reads TSV inputs from inputs/, performs a simple, direct data
# transformation, and writes compact CSV + RDS results to outputs/.

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
})

# Helper to read TSV with header, no factor conversion
read_tsv <- function(path) {
  fread(path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, data.table = FALSE)
}

# Read all inputs
data_path_df          <- read_tsv("inputs/data_path.tsv")
mapping_df            <- read_tsv("inputs/mapping.tsv")
output_path_df        <- read_tsv("inputs/output_path.tsv")
ratio_table_df        <- read_tsv("inputs/ratio_table.tsv")
settings_file_path_df <- read_tsv("inputs/settings_file_path.tsv")
template_path_df      <- read_tsv("inputs/template_path.tsv")

# Treat 1-column tables (other than data_path) as vectors, preserving order
to_scalar_or_vector <- function(df) {
  if (ncol(df) == 1) {
    v <- df[[1]]
    v
  } else {
    df
  }
}

mapping_vec       <- to_scalar_or_vector(mapping_df)
output_path_vec   <- to_scalar_or_vector(output_path_df)
ratio_table_vec   <- to_scalar_or_vector(ratio_table_df)
settings_vec      <- to_scalar_or_vector(settings_file_path_df)
template_vec      <- to_scalar_or_vector(template_path_df)

# Construct a compact, inspectable result using aNCA-like conventions:
# - Use the main "data_path" table as the core dataset
# - Keep only columns referenced in mapping/output/ratio/settings/template
# - Preserve row alignment exactly as in data_path_df

# Collect all requested column names from the 1-column TSVs
requested_cols <- unique(c(
  mapping_vec,
  output_path_vec,
  ratio_table_vec,
  settings_vec,
  template_vec
))

# Restrict to columns that actually exist in the main data
requested_cols <- intersect(requested_cols, colnames(data_path_df))

# Always keep key identifiers if available
id_cols <- intersect(c("USUBJID", "STUDYID", "PARAMCD", "PARAM"), colnames(data_path_df))

cols_to_keep <- unique(c(id_cols, requested_cols))

result <- data_path_df[, cols_to_keep, drop = FALSE]

# Create outputs directory
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) {
  dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
}

# Write compact CSV
write.csv(result, file = "outputs/result.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Also write full result as RDS
saveRDS(result, file = "outputs/result.rds")
```
